heading: Flood risk in Codrington — What Property Owners Need to Know

faq.question: How can I check flood risk risk for a specific property in Codrington?

faq.question: Does flood risk risk affect property insurance in Codrington?
faq.answer: Insurance premiums in Codrington can be influenced by flood risk risk. Higher-risk properties may face higher premiums or excesses. A full climate report includes insurance cost projections.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.7% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
